LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER RYAN AKKY'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THE COURT CONFIRMED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. GRANTED. MR. AKKY IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN HIS FAVOR IN THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $191,521.86 WITH INTEREST FROM SEPTEMBER 13, 2016 PLUS COSTS OF $600. NO ATTORNEY'S FEES ARE AWARDED BECAUSE THE PETITION DOES NOT SPECIFY A PARTICULAR AMOUNT OF FEES. PETITIONER MAY FILE A POST-JUDGMENT MOTION FOR FEES. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 16257017) FILED BY PETITIONER AKKY, RYAN HEARING SET FOR OCT-12-2016 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
NOTICE OF PETITIONERS EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER REPLACING FILED DOCUMENTS WITH REDACTED VERSIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 59631158) FILED BY PETITIONER AKKY, RYAN
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-12-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 59892694) FILED BY PETITIONER AKKY, RYAN
ORDER CONFIRMING TENTATIVE RULING GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER AKKY, RYAN RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT DARIC, INC. $191,121.86 PRINCIPAL, $1,526.45 INTEREST, $600.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $193,248.31, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Jaime Touchstone telephone number 415-399-3840 for Petitioner Ryan Akky.
No appearance was made by any other Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Petitioner Ryan Akky's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. Mr. Akky is entitled to judgment in his favor in the principal amount of $191,521.86 with interest from September 13, 2016 plus costs of $600. No attorney's fees are awarded because the petition does not specify a particular amount of fees. Petitioner may file a post-judgment motion for fees. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
